name: agent-ops
description: Author, operate, and review full-spectrum agentic systems and the repos they live in — agent loops & teams, the control plane, harness & context engineering, agentic-workflow UX, and repo memory/docs (AGENTS.md · README · CHANGELOG · ROADMAP · ADRs) + architecture review — with a named-practitioner council, verifiable gates (loop blueprints, audit ledgers), and a repo-memory MCP for per-instance retrieval over a repo's agent docs + audit ledger.

corpus_dir.title: Repo memory directory
corpus_dir.description: Path to a repo (or docs dir) whose agent memory the repo-memory MCP reads: AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md / README / CHANGELOG / ROADMAP / ADRs + the .agents/brain/audit-history/ ledger. Optional — leave unset to run the loops, council, and gates without live retrieval.
